deals.Description: An AI-native Islamic digital bank offering AI-powered financial features to simplify how users manage, move, and grow their money.
A hospitality platform that provides capital to independent restaurants in exchange for future food and beverage credit, aimed at fueling restaurant expansion.
deals.Investors: Founders of PropertyFinder, Founders of Jellysmack

deals.Description: An AI company applying synthetic data for AI-driven decision-making in financial services, specializing in generative artificial intelligence for credit scoring and risk management. It offers Lucid, a no-code platform for building and deploying predictive AI solutions.
deals.Investors: Carbide Ventures, Shukhrat Ibragimov, Prosus Ventures
